title: ETERNULL
description: Explore the Corruption and fight the Null!
body:
![ETERNULL Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19b8493f57f5686081343ef5812cc48060c06140.png)

Introducing the popular creepypasta, Null, into Minecraft!

- Explore a **new overworld biome: The Corruption!** This biome spreads over time so be careful!
- Fight **Corrupted Mob Variants** that spawn in The Corruption: **Corrupted zombies, spiders, and creepers!** Their drops can craft Dark Cores!
- Hunt the **Null** but don't get hunted by them! Killing them will award you with **Nullite**!
- Convert your iron tools and armor into the powerful** Nullite Armor and Tools/Weapons** using a smithing table, a Nullite, and a Dark Core! This armor and weapons/tools inflict the **wither effect** on vanilla mobs!
- Build and create with a new wood variant: **Dark Wood**!
Change difficulties for different experiences! 
- **Easy**: Corrupted mobs don't inflict wither effect, no darkness effect in The Corruption
- **Normal**: Corrupted mobs inflict wither effect on you! No darkness effect in The Corruption
- **Hard/Hardcore**: Corrupted mobs inflict the wither effect for double the time as Normal! Experience The Corruption in a new way with the Darkness effect!


CurseForge: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/eternull](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/eternull)
